reasoning: There was a brief conflict and airstrikes between India and Pakistan in early May 2025. However, a US-brokered ceasefire went into effect on May 10. While there were some minor accusations of cross-border drone activity/violations shortly after, there are absolutely no reports of Pakistan launching a 'military offensive intended to establish control over any portion of India' between May 10 and June 22. The Polymarket price was 0.01 on June 12, reflecting the fact that the conflict had ended without an invasion. With only 8 days left in June, the probability of a sudden invasion to seize territory is extremely low.
